dependencies.rule: restore only the exact accepted artifact through an authorized retained-artifact channel; the active route copies and verifies bytes and never rerenders, remuxes, or transcodes it

authority_file_inventory.role: ignored current-host authority hashes; caption text is not copied into tracked state

semantic_authority_snapshot.role: tracked timing/hash/locator contract; actual caption text is loaded from ignored authority or reacquired official captions

subtitles.recovery_rule: normalize official ja caption events, then require exact per-text SHA-256 and timing contract match

cut_decisions.manual_override_reason: context flag is caused by immediate following subtitle boundary; official subtitle track source, moderate subtitle density, and retained context risk visibility make it worth carrying to production subtitle/render acceptance as a candidate, not as production-approved

fresh_clone_recovery.caption_precondition: official Japanese JSON3 authority must exist before semantic rebuild; tracked data alone is intentionally insufficient
authority_reacquisition_commands: python -m src.cli.main fetch-source-video --episode-id jp_pilot01_hololive_bancho_20260525 --material-id src_video_jp_pilot01 --mode yt-dlp-video --source-url https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7J5aS_pcBj4

python -m src.cli.main fetch-source-audio --episode-id jp_pilot01_hololive_bancho_20260525 --material-id src_audio_jp_pilot01 --mode yt-dlp-audio --source-url https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7J5aS_pcBj4

source_revision_gate.on_mismatch: stop and qualify a new same-source media revision; never alias hashes
